name: First Steps to Take After Your Workplace Injury

step.name: Step 1
step.text: Got hurt on the clock? First, tell your supervisor immediately—even if it seems minor. Next, head to a doctor and be crystal clear that this happened at work so it's documented right. Finally, keep track of every form you sign. If the paperwork starts feeling like a mountain, that's when you give us a shout at 801-746-0290 to handle the heavy lifting.

description: First Steps to Take After Your Workplace Injury - Murray
